testcase.name: Add product to cart
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in with valid credentials..............................passed When user adds a product to the cart........................................passed Then product should be displayed in the cart................................passed

testcase.name: Remove product from cart
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in with valid credentials..............................passed Given user adds a product to the carts......................................undefined When user removes the product from the cart.................................skipped Then cart should be empty...................................................skipped

testcase.name: Complete checkout process

testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in with valid credentials..............................passed Given user adds a product to the cart.......................................passed And user navigates to the cart page.........................................passed When user clicks on checkout................................................passed And user enters first name "John" last name "Doe" and postal code "600001"..passed And user clicks on continue.................................................passed And user clicks on finish...................................................failed Then order should be placed successfully....................................skipped

testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given user is on the login page.............................................passed When user enters username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce".......passed And user clicks on login button.............................................passed Then user should be navigated to the products page..........................passed

testcase.name: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given user is on the login page.............................................passed When user enters username "invalid_user" and password "secret_sauce"........passed And user clicks on login button.............................................passed Then user should see error message..........................................passed

testcase.name: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given user is on the login page.............................................passed When user enters username "standard_user" and password "wrong_pass".........passed And user clicks on login button.............................................passed Then user should see error message..........................................passed

testcase.name: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials - #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given user is on the login page.............................................passed When user enters username "" and password "secret_sauce"....................passed And user clicks on login button.............................................passed Then user should see error message..........................................passed
